---
title: "Appendix"
---

## Raw Data 

- **Source Data:** form-1__tree-inventory.csv - EpicCollect5 exported tree inventory data

## Data Fields

The inventory includes the following measured and recorded fields:

- **ec5_uuid:** Unique identifier from EpicCollect5
- **created_at:** Timestamp when record was created
- **uploaded_at:** Timestamp when record was uploaded
- **1_Surveyor_Name:** Name of person conducting the survey
- **2_Park_Location:** Location/park code (RH-P, etc.)
- **3_Tree_ID:** Unique tree identifier
- **4_Photo:** Reference to photo documentation
- **5_Tree_Height_ft:** Height measurement in feet
- **lat_6_Location:** Latitude coordinate
- **long_6_Location:** Longitude coordinate
- **accuracy_6_Location:** GPS accuracy in meters
- **UTM_Northing_6_Location:** UTM northing coordinate
- **UTM_Easting_6_Location:** UTM easting coordinate
- **UTM_Zone_6_Location:** UTM zone
- **7_Diameter_at_Breast:** DBH measurement
- **8_Tree_Spread_tip_to:** Crown spread measurement 1
- **9_Tree_Spread_tip_to:** Crown spread measurement 2
- **10_Tree_Condition:** Visual condition rating (Good/Fair/Poor/Stump)
- **11_Notes_eg_mushroom:** Additional notes and observations
